papers.title_en: ONCO-RADS–guided Large Language Models for Extraction and Classification of Incidental Findings on Whole-Body Imaging Reports
papers.tldr: 本研究评估了大语言模型（LLM）在全身影像报告中提取和分类偶然发现（IFs）的表现，重点探讨了结合ONCO-RADS（肿瘤相关发现报告与数据系统）指南的策略。通过对比不同LLM配置，研究旨在提高对具有临床意义的肿瘤相关发现的识别效率，为自动化处理复杂医学影像报告及临床决策支持提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Purpose To evaluate large language model (LLM)–based strategy performance forextraction and classification of incidental findings from whole-body (WB) imagingreports, particularly strategies incorporating Oncologically Relevant Findings …

papers.title_en: Quantitative Assessment of Lung Nodule: Deep Learning and Radiomics
papers.tldr: 本文探讨了利用深度学习和影像组学技术对胸部CT及X射线影像中的肺结节进行定量评估的方法。研究旨在通过自动化和量化手段辅助放射科医生，提高结节检测与良恶性分类的准确性，从而优化肺癌早期筛查的临床决策流程。
papers.abstract_en: Evaluating pulmonary nodules, which may potentially indicate lung cancer, is acrucial aspect of chest imaging. The visual examination of chest radiography andchest computed tomography (CT) scans by radiologists has traditionally formed the …

papers.title_en: MedSegAgent: A Universal and Scalable Multi-Agent System for Instructive Medical Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: MedSegAgent是一个通用且可扩展的多智能体系统，旨在解决现有医疗图像分割框架在处理多样化模态和解剖目标时通用性不足的问题。该系统通过多智能体协作机制，能够根据指令灵活执行跨模态的分割任务，显著提升了医疗影像分析的自动化水平和临床适用性。
papers.abstract_en: Medical image segmentation is vital for clinical diagnosis and treatment; however,current solutions face three major limitations:(1) the lack of a universal frameworkcapable of handling diverse modalities and anatomical targets,(2) the limited …

papers.title_en: FedPA: Federated Learning with Performance-Based Averaging for Efficient Medical Image Classification
papers.tldr: 本文针对联邦学习在医学图像分类中面临的非独立同分布（non-IID）数据挑战，提出了FedPA算法。该方法通过引入基于性能的加权平均机制，根据客户端更新的质量动态调整其对全局模型的贡献，从而克服了传统聚合方式在处理异构数据时的局限性，显著提升了全局模型的性能和训练效率。
papers.abstract_en: Federated learning is a decentralized model training paradigm with significantpotential. However, the quality of Federated Network's client updates can vary due tonon-IID data distributions, leading to suboptimal global models. To address this …

papers.title_en: Advancing Radiograph Representation Learning via Cascading Graph Alignment for Vision-Language Clinical Concepts
papers.tldr: 本研究针对放射影像与报告预训练中临床概念对齐不充分的问题，提出了级联图对齐（Cascading Graph Alignment）框架。该方法通过显式构建图结构来对齐视觉与文本中的关键临床概念，克服了传统隐式对齐难以捕捉显著临床特征的局限性。实验证明，该方法显著提升了放射影像的特征表示能力，在多项下游医学影像任务中取得了优异表现，为医疗视觉语言预训练提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-language pre-training on paired radiology images and reports has showngreat potential to promote downstream image tasks. However, its potential is far fromfully unleashed when conducting implicit alignment for clinically significant concepts …

papers.title_en: A semantic-aware approach to ontology revision using pre-trained language models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对本体修订中逻辑不一致性的挑战，提出了一种利用预训练语言模型（PLM）的语义感知方法。该方法旨在将新本体无缝整合到现有本体中，通过引入深度学习的语义理解能力来优化传统的逻辑修复过程。主要贡献在于结合了PLM的语义表征与形式化逻辑推理，显著提升了本体在演化、维护及对齐过程中的准确性。
papers.abstract_en: Ontology revision aims to seamlessly incorporate a new ontology into an existingontology and plays a crucial role in ontology evolution, ontology maintenance, andontology alignment. Similar to single-ontology repair, addressing logical incoherence …

papers.title_en: GiLT: Augmenting Transformer Language Models with Dependency Graphs
papers.tldr: 本研究提出GiLT，旨在通过引入依存图（Dependency Graphs）来增强Transformer语言模型的语言结构建模能力。以往研究多侧重于成分树结构，而本文探索了依存关系在提升模型语法泛化性能方面的潜力。通过将依存图集成到Transformer架构中，该方法有效增强了模型对复杂句法结构的理解，为提升语言模型的结构化表示提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Augmenting Transformers with linguistic structures effectively enhances the syntacticgeneralization performance of language models. Previous work in this directionfocuses on syntactic tree structures of languages, in particular constituency tree …

papers.title_en: EchoReason: a Two-stage Clinically Aligned Vision-Language Framework for Interpretable Diseases Diagnosis from Multi-Modal Ultrasound
papers.tldr: 超声检查在疾病筛查中至关重要，但受限于耗时、依赖操作者经验及定性评估的变异性。本文提出 EchoReason，一个两阶段临床对齐的视觉-语言框架，旨在从多模态超声中实现可解释的疾病诊断。该框架通过模拟临床推理过程，提高了诊断的一致性和透明度，为自动化超声分析提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Ultrasound imaging is a cornerstone of disease screening, yet its clinical utility isoften limited by time-intensive and operator-dependent interpretation, as well asvariability in qualitative assessment. In particular, extracting consistent quantitative …

papers.title_en: AGENT-DIFF-X: A Consumer-Adaptive Agentic Framework for Efficient and Explainable 3D Breast Tumor Segmentation on Edge Devices
papers.tldr: 针对资源受限临床环境下3D乳腺肿瘤分割模型部署难的问题，本文提出AGENT-DIFF-X框架。该框架采用代理化设计，结合扩散模型与边缘计算优化，实现了在消费级边缘设备上的高效运行。它不仅降低了对高性能硬件的依赖，还通过可解释性机制增强了临床信任，为基层医疗机构提供了一种兼顾性能、效率与透明度的轻量化解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: The deployment of sophisticated AI segmentation models faces major obstacleswhen used in clinical settings with limited resources because these systems needpowerful computers and complex interpretation methods, which prevent regional …

papers.title_en: Uncertainty-Aware Vision–Language Learning Improves Chest X-Ray Retrieval
papers.tldr: 针对传统视觉-语言模型在生物医学领域因确定性嵌入而缺乏可靠性的问题，本文提出 MedProbCLIP。该模型通过引入不确定性感知的概率嵌入，改进了胸部 X 射线图像与文本的表征学习。实验证明，该方法在医学影像检索任务中显著优于现有模型，不仅提升了检索精度，还为高风险医疗场景提供了必要的可靠性评估，是生物医学基础模型的重要改进。
papers.abstract_en: Vision–language foundation models have emerged as powerful general-purposerepresentation learners, but their deterministic embeddings often fail to provide thereliability required for high-stakes biomedical tasks. We introduce MedProbCLIP, a …

papers.title_en: A Multimodal Feature Distillation with Mamba-Transformer Network for Brain Tumor Segmentation with Incomplete Modalities
papers.tldr: 针对临床中MRI模态缺失导致的脑肿瘤分割难题，本文提出一种结合Mamba与Transformer的特征蒸馏网络。该方法利用Mamba的长程建模能力与Transformer的全局注意力机制，通过多模态特征蒸馏技术，在模态不全的情况下实现高性能的脑肿瘤分割，显著提升了模型在实际临床场景中的鲁棒性。
papers.abstract_en: Existing brain tumor segmentation methods usually utilize multiple MagneticResonance Imaging (MRI) modalities in brain tumor images for segmentation, whichcan achieve better segmentation performance. However, in clinical applications …

papers.title_en: AgentHER: Hindsight Experience Replay for LLM Agent Trajectory Relabeling
papers.tldr: 针对LLM智能体在复杂任务中失败率高且失败轨迹被大量浪费的问题，本文提出AgentHER。该方法借鉴强化学习中的事后经验重放（HER）思想，通过对失败轨迹进行重新标注，将其转化为针对其他目标的成功示例。这一方法显著提高了数据利用率，为提升LLM智能体在WebArena和ToolBench等挑战性任务上的表现提供了新路径。
papers.abstract_en: LLM agents fail on the majority of real-world tasks--GPT-4o succeeds on fewer than15% of WebArena navigation tasks and below 55% pass@ 1 on ToolBench (Zhou etal., 2024; Qin et al., 2024)--yet every failed trajectory is routinely discarded, wasting …

papers.title_en: Learning the Signature of Memorization in Autoregressive Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对微调语言模型的成员推理攻击（MIA）展开，指出传统方法依赖人工启发式规则（如损失阈值、Min-K%等）的局限性。作者提出了首个可迁移的学习型攻击方法，通过学习模型记忆的特征而非依赖人工直觉，显著提升了识别训练数据成员身份的准确性，为评估大模型隐私风险提供了更强大的工具。
papers.abstract_en: All prior membership inference attacks for fine-tuned language models use hand-crafted heuristics (eg, loss thresholding, Min-K\%, reference calibration), eachbounded by the designer's intuition. We introduce the first transferable learned …

papers.title_en: CoME-VL: Scaling Complementary Multi-Encoder Vision-Language Learning
papers.tldr: 针对当前视觉语言模型过度依赖单一对比学习编码器导致视觉特征捕获不全的问题，本文提出CoME-VL框架。该方法通过整合多个互补的视觉编码器（如对比学习与自监督学习模型），并探索其在大规模预训练下的扩展性。研究证明，多编码器融合能显著提升模型在跨模态对齐、图像描述及视觉问答等任务上的表现，为构建更强大的通用视觉语言模型提供了新路径。
papers.abstract_en: Recent vision-language models (VLMs) typically rely on a single vision encodertrained with contrastive image-text objectives, such as CLIP-style pretraining. Whilecontrastive encoders are effective for cross-modal alignment and retrieval, self …

papers.title_en: Saliency-R1: Enforcing Interpretable and Faithful Vision-language Reasoning via Saliency-map Alignment Reward
papers.tldr: 本研究针对视觉语言模型（VLM）过度依赖文本线索而忽视视觉证据的问题，提出了Saliency-R1框架。该方法通过引入“显著图对齐奖励”，在强化学习过程中强制模型的推理逻辑与视觉显著性区域保持一致。实验证明，该方法显著提升了VLM在复杂推理任务中的解释性和忠实度，有效减少了模型幻觉，增强了多模态决策的可靠性。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-language models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable success across diversetasks. However, concerns about their trustworthiness persist, particularly regardingtendencies to lean more on textual cues than visual evidence and the risk of …

papers.title_en: The Illusion of Superposition? A Principled Analysis of Latent Thinking in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究对大语言模型中的“潜空间思维”（Latent CoT）进行了深入分析。Latent CoT 通过连续向量空间进行推理，被认为比离散推理更具表达力，并可能实现“叠加态”处理。作者通过理论与实验评估，探讨了这种连续推理是否真的利用了叠加效应来增强性能，还是仅仅是一种错觉，为理解模型内部推理机制提供了重要见解。
papers.abstract_en: Latent reasoning via continuous chain-of-thoughts (Latent CoT) has emerged as apromising alternative to discrete CoT reasoning. Operating in continuous spaceincreases expressivity and has been hypothesized to enable superposition: the …

papers.tldr: 本研究针对扩散语言模型（DLM）在生成质量上逊于自回归模型的问题，提出了“内省一致性”这一核心概念。作者发现DLM往往无法与其自身生成的内容保持一致，从而限制了性能。为此，本文提出了内省扩散语言模型，旨在通过优化一致性来缩小与自回归模型的差距。该方法在保持并行生成优势的同时，显著提升了文本生成的质量和准确性，为非自回归语言模型的发展提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion language models promise parallel generation, yet still lag behindautoregressive (AR) models in quality. We stem this gap to a failure of introspectiveconsistency: AR models agree with their own generations, while DLMs often do not …

papers.title_en: LoSA: Locality Aware Sparse Attention for Block-Wise Diffusion Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对块状扩散语言模型（DLM）在长文本场景下受限于内存密集型注意力机制的问题，本文提出了LoSA（局部感知稀疏注意力）。该方法利用扩散模型生成过程中的局部性特征，优化了注意力计算效率。LoSA在保持生成质量的同时，显著降低了长序列处理的内存开销和计算复杂度，为高效非自回归文本生成提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Block-wise diffusion language models (DLMs) generate multiple tokens in any order,offering a promising alternative to the autoregressive decoding pipeline. However,they still remain bottlenecked by memory-bound attention in long-context scenarios …

papers.title_en: CLIP Architecture for Abdominal CT Image-Text Alignment and Zero-Shot Learning: Investigating Batch Composition and Data Scaling
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了CLIP架构在3D腹部CT图像与文本报告对齐中的应用，重点研究了训练批次组成（Batch Composition）和数据规模对零样本诊断性能的影响。通过在3D医疗数据上进行对比学习，揭示了表征学习的优化路径，为提升医疗视觉语言模型的泛化能力提供了重要见解。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-language models trained with contrastive learning on paired medical imagesand reports show strong zero-shot diagnostic capabilities, yet the effect of trainingbatch composition on learned representations remains unexplored for 3D medical …
